name: ASUS ROG Strix Helios GX601 White Edition RGB Mid-Tower Computer Case for ATX/ EATX Motherboards with Tempered Glass, Aluminum Frame, GPU Braces, 420mm Radiator Support and Aura Sync
shortName: ASUS ROG Strix Helios GX601 White Edition RGB Mid-Tower Computer Case
description: Premium white mid-tower case designed for high-end ATX/EATX builds with RGB lighting and extensive radiator support.
